description: A candid color event photograph (no on-image text or design) from the same DHS Juneteenth flag-raising ceremony. A man in a dark suit stands at the base of a flagpole operating the halyard ropes to raise a red Juneteenth flag (partially furled, with white star visible) into a tree-lined green outdoor setting. To the right, a group of attendees in business attire stand watching, including a woman in a patterned tan/brown dress holding papers. Green conifers, shrubs, and a brick walkway frame the scene. This is a documentary news/event photo, not a designed meme or graphic; mark is_designed=false.
